groupings.title: Vue
groupings.description: A set of skills designed to review Vue.js code for quality, maintainability, and adherence to best practices, providing feedback and recommendations for improvement.

groupings.title: TypeScript
groupings.description: A set of skills designed to review TypeScript code for quality, maintainability, and adherence to best practices, providing feedback and recommendations for improvement.

groupings.title: Poor Web Performance
groupings.description: A set of skills designed to introduce bad performance practices into web applications, including memory leaks, UI blocking, and inefficient algorithms, to intentionally degrade performance and create a poor user experience.
